summary: Per-Document Intelligence Engine (Iteration 182) - All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification successful - Learning Pulse section renders correctly with all UI elements (Refresh button, Backfill History button, 5 calibration bands, Top Vendors, Validation Gap Hotspots, Live Learning Feed).

design_issues.screen: AI Learning page - Recent Learning Events table
issues: Minor HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality (same as iteration 181)

critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms Per-Document Intelligence Engine is correctly implemented:

1. per_document_learning_service.py: All 6 learning dimensions implemented (outcome recording, vendor intelligence, confidence calibration, positive reinforcement, validation gap analysis, extraction accuracy tracking)

2. posting_patterns.py lines 2929-3006: All 4 new endpoints correctly implemented (/learning-pulse, /learning-pulse/vendor/{vendor_no}, /learning-pulse/confidence-calibration, /learning-pulse/backfill)
3. LearningDashboard.js: LearningPulseSection component correctly renders with all required data-testid attributes
4. All endpoints return valid data structures with proper error handling
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data from previous backfill
context_for_next_testing_agent: Per-Document Intelligence Engine feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse returns valid structure with total_documents_learned_from, outcomes, confidence_calibration, top_vendors, validation_gap_hotspots, recent_learning, generated_at; (2) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse/confidence-calibration returns global, by_vendor, by_doc_type calibration data; (3) POST /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse/backfill?limit=50 processes documents and returns processed/errors counts; (4) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse/vendor/ANCH returns vendor-specific learning profile; (5) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse/vendor/NONEXISTENT returns appropriate 'no learning data' message; (6) Frontend Learning Pulse section renders at /ai-learning with data-testid='learning-pulse-section'; (7) Refresh button (data-testid='refresh-pulse-btn') works; (8) Backfill History button (data-testid='backfill-btn') works and shows toast notification; (9) All 5 calibration bands render with data-testid='calibration-band-{band}' pattern; (10) All existing dashboard sections still render correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse - Returns valid structure with all required fields - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse/confidence-calibration - Returns global, by_vendor, by_doc_type - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-pulse/vendor/NONEXISTENT - Returns 'no learning data' message - PASS
Calibration bands structure validation - All bands have total, correct, accuracy - PASS
Top vendors structure validation - All vendors have vendor_no, total_documents - PASS
Recent learning structure validation - All events have doc_id, trigger, outcome, recorded_at - PASS
Backfill then verify pulse integration test - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: AI Learning page loads at /ai-learning - PASS
Learning Pulse Section (data-testid='learning-pulse-section') found and visible - PASS
Refresh Pulse button (data-testid='refresh-pulse-btn') found, visible, enabled, clickable - PASS
Backfill History button (data-testid='backfill-btn') found, visible, enabled, clickable - PASS
Backfill button click shows toast notification - PASS

mocked_apis.note: All tests use real API endpoints with real MongoDB operations. The 5 new collections (document_outcomes, vendor_realtime_intelligence, confidence_calibration, validation_gap_log, field_accuracy_tracking) are populated with real data from backfill.

learning_pulse_data.note: Data reflects real learning from existing documents in the system
